# PRODUCTION_ENVIRONMENT

****

The container environment is accessible by both development apps and apps available on the store.

## Declaration

```swift
const String PRODUCTION_ENVIRONMENT;
```

## Constants

- **DEVELOPMENT_ENVIRONMENT**: The container environment is not accessible by apps available on the store.

items.description: The container environment is not accessible by apps available on the store.
items.name: DEVELOPMENT_ENVIRONMENT

title: PRODUCTION_ENVIRONMENT
